title: GitHub PR loop skeleton
objective: Add the minimal branch/commit/PR creation skeleton using gh CLI when available, without requiring it for smoke tests.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Add optional command for PR creation from a run result.
If gh is unavailable, command fails with actionable message.
Initial output is PR body/summary markdown even without creating a PR.
Docs define G0 local patch, G1 gh PR, G2 GitHub Actions progression.

koObjective: run 결과를 branch/commit/PR/comment/artifact 흐름으로 연결하는 기초를 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
